---
title: "Angela Zhao, BS"
image: profile_final.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
---

### ScM Biostatistics Student at Johns Hopkins University

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
## quarto preview to preview
## quarto render to render
```

[about] (about.qmd)
[about] (about.qmd#section)
